raw_consumer_statement:
I filed a dispute with Barclays Bank XXXX on XX/XX/year>, regarding a charge of {$400.00} USD from the XXXX XXXX XXXX, which appeared on my credit card statement. The charge includes an unauthorized restaurant bill of approximately {$200.00} USD that I did not incur. 

Despite my repeated requests, XXXX XXXX failed to provide any proof, such as a signed restaurant bill, to justify the disputed charge. 

On XX/XX/year>, I contacted Barclays to check the status of the dispute and was informed that the case had already been closedwithout any prior notification to me. I was not given a chance to respond to any findings or review the merchants evidence, if any. Barclays also failed to provide a written resolution report or disclose any documentation they received from the merchant. 

I believe this case was handled improperly and prematurely closed, without following appropriate procedures under the Fair Credit Billing Act. I am requesting that the CFPB investigate this matter and ensure Barclays reopens the dispute and properly reviews the evidence.
